title: Unknown Input, Zod 4 Validation, Domain Types, and Output Contracts · Type-System Trace: Branded Domain Types
summary: The service casts req.body, accepts unknown keys, transforms before authorization, returns internal objects directly, and treats TypeScript inference as runtime proof. Planned artifact: Add and verify the httpsts branded domain types increment in runtime schema and trusted domain boundary. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Construct narrow branded identifiers and domain values only through validated factories while avoiding unsafe assertions and impossible-state widening.

steps.title: Node and Express server Predict Branded Domain Types · Theory Branded Domain Types
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory team handles case 4978 in a multi-tenant case service with a bounded PostgreSQL pool. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to admit unknown input through strict runtime and output schemas; preserve response ownership after a client abort; then fail the canary while the old revision drains and prove rollback remains safe. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Construct narrow branded identifiers and domain values only through validated factories while avoiding unsafe assertions and impossible-state widening.
